name: Chult
summary: A steaming peninsula of deep jungle, lost cities, dinosaurs, undead, merchant princes and dangerous river routes beneath relentless heat.
politics: Chult is shaped by local powers, trade needs and old conflicts.
Adventurers can shift local balances quickly if they earn trust or fear.
culture: People of Chult carry strong local customs and stories.
Rumour, reputation and practical help matter to most communities.
rumours: Something old has stirred somewhere in Chult.
A recent disappearance has locals worried.
A merchant is paying quietly for reliable blades.
dmSecrets: A hidden faction is exploiting unrest in Chult.
An old site nearby is connected to a larger campaign mystery.
